mapper.insert: /* TH_ECS_CTZN_MENU_CONECT_Dao_insertMenuLogInfo */ INSERT INTO th_ecs_ctzn_menu_conect (menu_id, conect_dttm, sys_div_cd, menu_nm, conctr_id, conctr_nm, conect_parm_ctnt, conctr_ip) VALUES ( #{menuId}, LOCALTIMESTAMP, #{sysDivCd}, #{menuNm}, #{usrId}, #{usrNm}, #{conectParamCtnt}, #{conectIp} )
